title: Bioluminescence Resonance Energy Transfer at Various Ratios of Expressed Proteins
author: Benoit Besson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jepcjdn

steps.title: Plate HEK-293T cells in 384 plates...
steps.instruction: Plate HEK-293T cells in 384 plates with 3000 cells per well in 50 µL of medium

steps.title: Centrifuge plate at 900 g for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge plate at 900 g for 1 min.

steps.title: Prepare a DNA mix with 25...
steps.instruction: Prepare a DNA mix with 25 ng of plasmid expressing Nluc-tagged and YFP-tagged protein in 1 µL of DMEM without FBS. Use a 1:1 ratio of plasmid or if specified, range the ratio of plasmids from 2:1 to 1:4 (Nluc:YFP).

steps.title: Mix with 0
steps.instruction: Mix with 0.15 µL of DuGENE6 (Promega) in 4 µL of DMEM without FBS.

steps.title: Incubate 30 min at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Incubate 30 min at room temperature and add gently 5µL to each well.

steps.title: Measure direct bioluminescence from the donor...
steps.instruction: Measure direct bioluminescence from the donor (Nluc) and the acceptor (YFP, noted NlucY) using a luminescence plate reader (ex: Wallac 1420 VICTOR 3V multilabel plate reader (PerkinElmer).

steps.title: The energy transfer between the Nluc...
steps.instruction: The energy transfer between the Nluc and YFP (BRET) is calculated according to the following formulas (2 and

steps.title: and normalized to a YFP-Nluc linked recombinant protein
steps.instruction: and normalized to a YFP-Nluc linked recombinant protein: CF value = NlucY value (prot-Nluc) / Nluc value (prot-Nluc) (

steps.title: netBRET = [ NlucY value -...
steps.instruction: netBRET = [ NlucY value - ( Nluc value x CF value ) ] / Nluc value (

steps.title: A threshold of specific interaction was...
steps.instruction: A threshold of specific interaction was determined using the mean+3SD of the negative controls within each experiment.
